analysis.reasoning: Core message: The tweet accuses the US of hypocrisy and discriminatory repression against Huawei because it is Chinese, calling the US action "dirty." Evaluation by narrative: CH1 (The West is immoral, hostile and decadent) — Supported: the tweet portrays the US as repressive, hypocritical, and acting immorally toward a Chinese company, positioning China/Huawei as a victim. CH2 (China is a benevolent power) — Not supported: no claims about China's cooperative or law-abiding international role, only victimization. CH3 (China has an epic history) — Not supported: no historical or resilience framing. CH4 (China has an appropriate political system and honorable values) — Not supported: no defense of China's political system or values. CH5 (The government of the Chinese Communist Party succeeds) — Not supported: no claims of governance success or achievements. CH6 (China is interesting culturally) — Not applicable. Conclusion: Only CH1 applies.
